summary: The user inquired about gender neutrality in product reviews for a "Big Boys Long Sleeve Full Zip Hoodie" by Ralph Lauren, discussing the implications of gendered language in reviews. The assistant provided insights on how to frame reviews in a gender-neutral manner but later acknowledged a mistake regarding the existence of a specific review.
facts: The user is from San Antonio. The user ordered a "Big Boys Long Sleeve Full Zip Hoodie" in size 14-16 Large, which felt like a 10-12 medium and was slightly small, recommending to get a size up. The user noted that the hoodie took 5 days to arrive. The user referenced a review from February 17, 2023, stating the hoodie runs small and is comfortable. The user mentioned a review from February 5, 2023, indicating that the hoodie shrinks every time it comes out of the dryer. The user cited a review from January 28, 2023, stating the hoodie fits well but has wide sleeves, making it look bigger. The user referred to a review from January 22, 2023, where the product was returned due to a poor fit. The user highlighted a review from January 20, 2023, expressing love for Ralph Lauren clothing. The user mentioned a review from January 18, 2023, praising the delivery time and quality of the hoodie.
